ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "PERID" INTEGER /* Personal ID of the individual */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household the individual belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the individual (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "RELATE" INTEGER /* Relationship to the head of the household */,
  "ESR" INTEGER /* Employment status recode */,
  "GRADE" INTEGER /* Grade in school or college */,
  "PNUM" INTEGER /* PNUM (Person number in household) */,
  "PAUG" INTEGER /* PAUG (Personal augmentation) */,
  "DDP" INTEGER /* DDP (Detailed demographic profile) */,
  "WEEKS" INTEGER /* Number of weeks worked in the past year */,
  "HOURS" INTEGER /* Average number of hours worked per week */,
  "MSP" INTEGER /* Marital status recode */,
  "POVERTY" INTEGER /* Poverty status */,
  "EARNS" INTEGER /* Earnings in the past year */,
  "pagecat" INTEGER /* Page category (e.g., 6 for employed full-time) */,
  "pemploy" INTEGER /* Employment status (e.g., 3 for employed full-time) */,
  "pstudent" INTEGER /* Student status (e.g., 3 for not in school) */,
  "ptype" INTEGER /* Person type (e.g., 4 for non-institutionalized civilian) */,
  "padkid" INTEGER /* Parent of kid (1 for yes, 2 for no) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnic background of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the individual works */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has health insurance */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Whether the individual has a disability */,
  "immigration_status" TEXT /* Immigration status of the individual */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_POVERTY FOREIGN KEY ("POVERTY") REFERENCES poverty_levels ("POVERTY_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_GRADE FOREIGN KEY ("GRADE") REFERENCES education_levels ("GRADE_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_MSP FOREIGN KEY ("MSP") REFERENCES marital_status ("MSP_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_pagecat FOREIGN KEY ("pagecat") REFERENCES employment_categories ("pagecat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_ESR FOREIGN KEY ("ESR") REFERENCES employment_status ("ESR_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the household */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the household is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the household is located */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the household */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Total household income */,
  "poverty_status" INTEGER /* Poverty status of the household */,
  "homeownership" INTEGER /* Whether the household owns or rents their home */,
  "internet_access" INTEGER /* Whether the household has internet access */,
  "type_of_residence" TEXT /* Type of residence (e.g., single-family home, apartment) */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Broader geographic region of the household's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_status" (
  "ESR_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment status */,
  "ESR_description" TEXT /* Description of the employment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ESR_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "GRADE_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "GRADE_description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("GRADE_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "MSP_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "MSP_description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("MSP_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_levels" (
  "POVERTY_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty level */,
  "POVERTY_description" TEXT /* Description of the poverty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("POVERTY_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_categories" (
  "pagecat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment category */,
  "pagecat_description" TEXT /* Description of the employment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pagecat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
